message: सफदरजंग हॉस्पिटल में बहुत क्रिटिकल एक्सीडेंट केस के लिए 3 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड चाहिए। मरीज वेंटिलेटर पर है। 9876500001
message_english: 3 units AB+ blood needed for a very critical accident case at Safdarjung Hospital. Patient is on ventilator. 9876500001

message: एम्स दिल्ली में एक छोटी बच्ची का ओपन हार्ट सर्जरी है, 2 यूनिट O- खून की तुरंत जरूरत है!
message_english: A little girl has open heart surgery at AIIMS Delhi, 2 units of O- blood are needed immediately!

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में भीषण सड़क दुर्घटना के बाद 4 यूनिट B+ ब्लड अत्यंत अर्जेंट है। कोई डोनर हो तो जल्दी बताएं।
message_english: 4 units B+ blood is extremely urgent after a severe road accident at Apollo Chennai. Let us know quickly if there is any donor.

message: मेदांता में लिवर ट्रांसप्लांट के बीच बहुत खून बह गया है। 5 यूनिट A+ खून तुरंत चाहिए। 8888111122
message_english: A lot of blood has been lost during liver transplant at Medanta. 5 units of A+ blood needed immediately. 8888111122

message: KEM मुंबई में प्रेगनेंसी कॉम्प्लिकेशन, माँ और बच्चे की जान खतरे में है। 2 यूनिट O+ ब्लड अभी चाहिए।
message_english: Pregnancy complication at KEM Mumbai, mother and child's life in danger. 2 units O+ blood needed right now.

message: मैक्स साकेत में हार्ट अटैक के मरीज को तुरंत 1 यूनिट AB- खून की आवश्यकता है। डोनर्स प्लीज अस्पताल पहुंचें।
message_english: 1 unit of AB- blood is immediately required for a heart attack patient at Max Saket. Donors please reach the hospital.

message: नारायणा बैंगलोर में डेंगू से प्लेटलेट्स 15 हज़ार रह गए हैं। 3 यूनिट A- ब्लड चाहिए आज रात तक। कॉल 9123456780
message_english: Platelets have dropped to 15 thousand due to dengue at Narayana Bangalore. 3 units of A- blood needed by tonight. Call 9123456780

message: सर गंगा राम अस्पताल में इंटरनल ब्लीडिंग रोकने के लिए 2 यूनिट B- ब्लड जल्द से जल्द चाहिए।
message_english: 2 units B- blood needed as soon as possible to stop internal bleeding at Sir Ganga Ram Hospital.

message: लीलावती मुंबई में कैंसर के मरीज का हीमोग्लोबिन 5 पर है। 2 यूनिट O- खून चाहिए कल सुबह तक।
message_english: Cancer patient's hemoglobin is at 5 at Lilavati Mumbai. 2 units O- blood needed by tomorrow morning.

message: फोर्टिस गुड़गांव में अपेंडिक्स फट गया है, 1 यूनिट B+ ब्लड चाहिए कल की सर्जरी से पहले।
message_english: Appendix burst at Fortis Gurgaon, 1 unit B+ blood needed before tomorrow's surgery.

message: KIMS हैदराबाद में डायलिसिस के दौरान 2 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड की सख्त जरूरत है। नंबर 7000070000
message_english: 2 units AB+ blood strictly needed during dialysis at KIMS Hyderabad. Number 7000070000

message: पीजीआईएमईआर चंडीगढ़ में जहर खाने के केस में 1 यूनिट O+ ब्लड चाहिए। कृपया ग्रुप में पूछकर बताएं।
message_english: 1 unit O+ blood needed in a poisoning case at PGIMER Chandigarh. Please ask in the group and let me know.

message: एम्स दिल्ली में थैलेसीमिया के मरीज के लिए रूटीन 1 यूनिट A+ ब्लड चाहिए। गुरुवार तक इंतजाम करना है। 9898989898
message_english: Routine 1 unit A+ blood needed for a thalassemia patient at AIIMS Delhi. Have to arrange by Thursday. 9898989898

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में बाईपास सर्जरी शेड्यूल है। 2 यूनिट O+ ब्लड की आवश्यकता होगी इस शुक्रवार।
message_english: Bypass surgery scheduled at Apollo Chennai. 2 units O+ blood will be needed this Friday.

message: KEM मुंबई में अगले हफ्ते सिजेरियन डिलीवरी है। 2 यूनिट B+ ब्लड की व्यवस्था करनी है। कोई डोनर हो तो बताएं।
message_english: Cesarean delivery is next week at KEM Mumbai. Need to arrange 2 units B+ blood. Let me know if there's a donor.

message: सफदरजंग दिल्ली में बच्चे के हर्निया ऑपरेशन के लिए 1 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड बैंक में जमा करना है।
message_english: Need to deposit 1 unit AB+ in the blood bank for a child's hernia operation at Safdarjung Delhi.

message: इस रविवार को दिल्ली के रोहिणी में एक विशाल रक्तदान शिविर है। कृपया आएं और अपना योगदान दें।
message_english: There is a huge blood donation camp in Rohini, Delhi this Sunday. Please come and make your contribution.

message: मेरे दादाजी के लिए मुंबई में O- ब्लड देने वाले सभी लोगों का हृदय से धन्यवाद। वह अब बिल्कुल स्वस्थ हैं। 🙏
message_english: Heartfelt thanks to everyone who gave O- blood for my grandfather in Mumbai. He is completely healthy now. 🙏

message: क्या कोई मुझे बता सकता है कि वैक्सीन लगने के कितने दिन बाद हम रक्तदान कर सकते हैं?
message_english: Can anyone tell me how many days after vaccination we can donate blood?

message: चंडीगढ़ रेड क्रॉस ब्लड बैंक में हर रविवार डोनर रजिस्ट्रेशन होता है। कृपया जाएं और अपना नाम दर्ज कराएं।
message_english: Donor registration takes place every Sunday at Chandigarh Red Cross Blood Bank. Please go and register your name.

message: Bhai log Fortis Gurgaon me highway crash ka victim aya hai. 4 unit O- blood URGENTLY chahiye!! Pls koi jaldi aao 9811122233
message_english: Brothers, a highway crash victim has come to Fortis Gurgaon. 4 units O- blood URGENTLY needed!! Pls someone come fast 9811122233

message: Lilavati Mumbai me patient ICU me sink kar raha hai. 2 unit AB- blood ekdum emergency me chahiye. Please help!
message_english: Patient is sinking in ICU at Lilavati Mumbai. 2 units AB- blood needed in extreme emergency. Please help!

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me liver burst ho gaya hai surgery me. 5 unit B+ blood ki bohot urgent need hai. Call 9990001112
message_english: Liver burst during surgery at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. Very urgent need for 5 units B+ blood. Call 9990001112

message: CMC Vellore me NICU me admitted premature baby ko 1 unit A- blood chahiye abhi ke abhi. Doctors bol rhe time nahi hai.
message_english: 1 unit A- blood needed right now for a premature baby admitted in NICU at CMC Vellore. Doctors say there is no time.

message: KIMS Hyderabad me multiple fractures ke karan bleeding ruk nahi rahi. 3 unit O+ blood ki bohot urgent need hai. Please share 🙏
message_english: Bleeding is not stopping due to multiple fractures at KIMS Hyderabad. Very urgent need for 3 units O+ blood. Please share 🙏

message: Narayana Bangalore me massive heart attack emergency hai. 2 unit B- blood chahiye turant. Please donate kare dosto.
message_english: Massive heart attack emergency at Narayana Bangalore. 2 units B- blood needed immediately. Please donate friends.

message: Max Saket me operation beech me ruka hai blood loss ki wajah se. 3 unit A+ blood ekdum turant zaruri hai. Pls help!!
message_english: Operation has stopped midway due to blood loss at Max Saket. 3 units A+ blood is absolutely immediately required. Pls help!!

message: AIIMS Delhi me accident trauma ki wajah se 4 unit AB+ blood abhi ke abhi chahiye! Khoon bohot beh chuka hai. 9123491234
message_english: 4 units AB+ blood needed right now due to accident trauma at AIIMS Delhi! A lot of blood has been lost. 9123491234

message: Apollo Chennai me massive hemorrhage ho raha hai delivery ke baad. 2 unit O+ blood chahiye within 15 mins. Call 7777766666
message_english: Massive hemorrhage happening after delivery at Apollo Chennai. 2 units O+ blood needed within 15 mins. Call 7777766666

message: PGIMER Chandigarh me poison consume karne ka case hai. 1 unit AB- blood ki immediate zaroorat hai wash ke liye. Pls RT.
message_english: Poison consumption case at PGIMER Chandigarh. 1 unit AB- blood is immediately needed for wash. Pls RT.

message: Medanta me patient chemo support par hai. 2 unit B+ blood required hai kal subah tak. Count bohot low chal raha hai.
message_english: Patient is on chemo support at Medanta. 2 units B+ blood required by tomorrow morning. Count is running very low.

message: KEM Mumbai me dengue fever severe ho gaya hai. 3 unit A- blood chahiye by evening. Drop a text agar aa sakte ho.
message_english: Dengue fever has become severe at KEM Mumbai. 3 units A- blood needed by evening. Drop a text if you can come.

message: Safdarjung me dialysis ke baad problem aa gayi hai. 2 unit O- blood ka prabandh karna hai kal dopahar tak. Please help. 8000080000
message_english: Problem occurred after dialysis at Safdarjung. Have to arrange 2 units O- blood by tomorrow afternoon. Please help. 8000080000

message: CMC Vellore me urgent transplant ki preparation chal rahi hai. 1 unit B- chahiye donor kal ke liye. Blood bank empty hai.
message_english: Preparation for urgent transplant going on at CMC Vellore. Need 1 unit B- donor for tomorrow. Blood bank is empty.

message: Fortis Gurgaon me internal bleeding chal rahi hai ulcer ki. 2 unit A+ blood chahiye raat 8 baje tak. Please groups me share karo.
message_english: Internal bleeding of ulcer going on at Fortis Gurgaon. 2 units A+ blood needed by 8 PM tonight. Please share in groups.

message: Lilavati Mumbai me acute liver failure hua hai. 3 unit AB+ blood chahiye reserve me rakhne ke liye kal subah tak.
message_english: Acute liver failure happened at Lilavati Mumbai. 3 units AB+ blood needed to keep in reserve by tomorrow morning.

message: KIMS Hyderabad me patient ka low hb hai, weakness bohot hai. 2 unit O+ blood chahiye kal subah tak. DM me agar aap de sakte ho.
message_english: Patient has low hb at KIMS Hyderabad, a lot of weakness. 2 units O+ blood needed by tomorrow morning. DM me if you can give.

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me gastric bleed ka patient admitted hai. 1 unit B+ required urgently aaj hi. Blood group rare nahi hai pls dhoondo.
message_english: Gastric bleed patient admitted at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. 1 unit B+ required urgently today itself. Blood group is not rare pls find.

message: Narayana Bangalore me chacha ji ki planned surgery hai Friday ko. Blood bank ne 2 unit A- deposit karne ko bola hai.
message_english: Uncle's planned surgery is on Friday at Narayana Bangalore. Blood bank has told to deposit 2 units A-.

message: Max Saket me next week knee replacement ke liye 1 unit O+ blood arrange karna hai. Doctor ne bola abhi se donor ready rakho.
message_english: Have to arrange 1 unit O+ blood for knee replacement next week at Max Saket. Doctor said to keep donor ready from now.

message: AIIMS Delhi me routine dialysis hona hai is week. 1 unit B+ blood chahiye hoga. Koi healthy donor free ho toh batana 9988998899 par.
message_english: Routine dialysis is to happen this week at AIIMS Delhi. 1 unit B+ blood will be needed. If any healthy donor is free tell on 9988998899.

message: Apollo Chennai me spinal surgery schedule honi hai Tuesday ko. 2 unit AB+ blood dena padega hospital me replacement ke liye.
message_english: Spinal surgery is to be scheduled on Tuesday at Apollo Chennai. Will have to give 2 units AB+ blood in hospital for replacement.

message: PGIMER Chandigarh me upcoming chemo support ke liye 1 unit O- blood chahiye aane wale somvaar ke liye. Contact 7777766666
message_english: 1 unit O- blood needed for upcoming chemo support at PGIMER Chandigarh for the coming Monday. Contact 7777766666

message: Medanta me planned tumor removal hai is weekend. Blood bank ne 2 unit B- blood secure karne ko bola hai safe side.
message_english: Planned tumor removal is at Medanta this weekend. Blood bank has told to secure 2 units B- blood on safe side.

message: Delhi NCR walo, is sunday Noida sec 18 me mega blood camp hai. Refreshment free milega. Jarur aao donate karne aur certificate pao.
message_english: Delhi NCR folks, there is a mega blood camp in Noida sec 18 this sunday. Refreshment will be free. Definitely come to donate and get certificate.

message: Jisne bhi mere brother ke liye O- blood diya unko bada wala Thank You! Wo ab bilkul theek hain aur discharge ho gaye.
message_english: A big Thank You to whoever gave O- blood for my brother! He is completely fine now and has been discharged.

message: Covid recovery ke kitne mahine baad blood donate kar sakte hain? Mujhe donation karna hai Pune me kal. Kisi ko idea hai?
message_english: How many months after Covid recovery can we donate blood? I have to donate in Pune tomorrow. Anyone has an idea?

message: Bangalore me verified NGOs ka koi contact list hai jo emergency me blood arrange karte hain? Ek list banani hai society ke liye.
message_english: Is there any contact list of verified NGOs in Bangalore that arrange blood in emergency? Need to make a list for society.

message: Youth ko awareness phailani chahiye! Har 3 mahine me ek baar blood donate zaroor karo. Chennai ke sabhi dosto ko forward karo.
message_english: Youth should spread awareness! Definitely donate blood once every 3 months. Forward to all friends in Chennai.

message: Humari IT company Hyderabad me Friday ko corporate blood drive organise kar rahi hai. Apne colleagues ko zarur le aao. RSVP 8000080000
message_english: Our IT company is organizing a corporate blood drive in Hyderabad on Friday. Definitely bring your colleagues. RSVP 8000080000
